data.title: Freelancer Joins NASA’s NOIS3 Panel to Tackle Space Challenges
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Freelancer ( (AU:FLN) ) has provided an update.

Freelancer Limited has been selected as one of 25 suppliers on NASA’s Open Innovation Services 3 (NOIS3) multi-vendor panel, allowing the company to provide crowdsourcing and open-innovation services to NASA and other U.S. government agencies. This inclusion signifies an expansion of Freelancer’s role in solving complex space-exploration challenges and enhances its industry positioning by leveraging its global marketplace and enterprise services. The contract, managed by NASA’s Johnson Space Center, has a total panel ceiling of $475 million and includes options for extension up to 2035.

More about Freelancer

Freelancer Limited is the world’s largest freelancing and crowdsourcing marketplace, boasting over 80 million registered users and more than 25 million projects across diverse fields such as website development, logo design, marketing, and aerospace engineering. The company also owns Escrow.com, a leader in secure online payments, and Loadshift, Australia’s largest heavy haulage freight marketplace. Freelancer is publicly traded on the Australian Securities Exchange and in the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 67,259

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$90.18M

data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Jaxsta Limited ( (AU:VNL) ) has provided an announcement.

Vinyl Group Ltd has issued 5,000,000 fully paid ordinary shares as part of the exercise of director options, with an application for quotation lodged with the ASX. This move is part of the company’s ongoing compliance with the Corporations Act and reflects its strategic efforts to strengthen its financial position and enhance shareholder value.

More about Jaxsta Limited

Vinyl Group Ltd is an Australian company listed on the ASX, specializing in the music industry by providing technology and media solutions that connect music creators, fans, and brands. Its portfolio includes Vinyl.com, an e-commerce platform, Vampr, a social-professional network, Jaxsta, a database of music credits, and Serenade, a Web3 platform for collectibles. The company also has a publishing arm, Vinyl Media, which operates various media outlets and licenses well-known mastheads in Australia.

data.title: NGE Capital Reports NTA Growth and Strategic Portfolio Adjustments
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

NGE Capital Ltd ( (AU:NGE) ) has provided an update.

NGE Capital Limited reported an increase in its Net Tangible Assets (NTA) per share, both before and after tax, as of May 31, 2025. The company made strategic portfolio adjustments, including trimming its holding in Capricorn Energy PLC due to favorable developments in its Egyptian assets and increasing its stake in Industrial Logistics Properties Trust based on potential financial improvements. Additionally, Exxaro Resources Limited’s acquisition of a significant stake in Jupiter Mines Limited, a company in which NGE holds shares, could lead to further strategic moves, potentially benefiting NGE’s investment position.

More about NGE Capital Ltd

NGE Capital Limited is an internally managed Listed Investment Company that provides investors with exposure to a concentrated, high conviction, actively managed portfolio of financial assets. The company primarily focuses on listed ASX and international equities, aiming to generate strong risk-adjusted returns over the medium to long term.

data.title: Personas Social Rebrands with New Trading Symbol ‘KEEK’
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Personas Social ( (TSE:PRSN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Personas Social Incorporated has announced a change in its trading symbol on the TSX Venture Exchange from ‘PRSN’ to ‘KEEK’, effective June 6, 2025. This change aligns with the company’s strategic rebranding initiative to emphasize the rollout of its new social platform, Keek. The change does not affect the company’s capitalization, and shareholders are not required to take any action. This move is part of Personas’ efforts to strengthen its market presence and enhance its brand identity in the competitive social media industry.

More about Personas Social

Personas Social Incorporated is a Canada-based company specializing in live video conferencing technology, live streaming, and social media products and services for both consumers and businesses. The company focuses on mobile products, offering social commerce-enabled solutions that provide a monetizable user experience, complete with enterprise-grade e-commerce infrastructure, including multi-currency and multi-lingual mobile commerce suites.

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Yamato Holdings Co ( (JP:9064) ) has shared an announcement.

Yamato Holdings Co., Ltd. has completed the acquisition of its own shares as per the provisions of its Articles of Incorporation and the Companies Act. The company acquired 695,700 common shares through market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, with the total acquisition cost amounting to 1,380,432,550 yen. This move is part of a larger share repurchase plan authorized by the Board of Directors, aiming to acquire up to 39 million shares, enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9064) stock is a Hold with a Yen2200.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Yamato Holdings Co stock, see the JP:9064 Stock Forecast page.

More about Yamato Holdings Co

Yamato Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the logistics and transportation industry, primarily focusing on package delivery services. The company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is known for its extensive network and service offerings in Japan.
